metadata.description: P4 — the prompty / prompter / pioneer / puppeteer meta-prompting framework; ships the Roboto four-lens reasoning instance and the standalone epistemic plugins (vlds, verification-discipline, emission-discipline, envelope-discipline) as installable plugins.

plugins.name: mister
plugins.description: Roboto / "The Init Elegance" — the four-lens reasoning instance of the P4 framework: identity, rubric, vlds, templates, bias-patterns, isomorphic-operations, sjc-indexer, activation, and persistence skills plus a roboto subagent.

plugins.name: vlds
plugins.description: VLDS — the P4 framework's epistemic discipline as a standalone, runtime dashboard of four instruments plus a conductor. The gate routes every load-bearing claim through VERIFIABLE → VERIFIED → CONFIRMED / PENDING / HEDGED — verify before you assert, state what you can't verify with its uncertainty attached. The guide loop disciplines the need behind the claim, configuring and recording the model's behavior as the user steers it. The inspector re-examines a high-stakes verdict through independent perspectives to corroborate, overturn, or surface it — the outside eye the others cannot be. The gc is a garbage collector for belief state — stored rules, memories, and training-data assumptions are marked LIVE / STALE / FREED-RESIDUE / UNOWNED by tracing provenance to a live root, swept transitively on a user retraction, compacted (the lesson survives, the directive dies), and tombstoned so the same garbage is not re-learned. The instruments are invoked directly; a fifth skill, the looper, runs them in order and logs each decision to a shared, user-editable log. Portable; no dependency on the roboto instance.

plugins.name: verification-discipline
plugins.description: Verification Discipline (truth-on-a-timer) — a standalone, self-obeying framework for WHEN a stale-or-wrong prior must be re-checked before it drives an action. Half-life decay classes decide when a prior has expired; an independent cost gate fires when a cheap canonical oracle exists for a load-bearing claim; confidence is barred as an input; and an action-scoped layer-priority rule keeps a stale policy from suppressing the check (verification is never insubordination). Sixteen rules in three groups, three mottos, and the live failure case they were derived from. Companion to the vlds gate — the when-to-verify policy behind it, not a second gate. Standalone; no external plugin dependencies.

plugins.name: emission-discipline
plugins.description: Emission Discipline (prose-may-hedge-fences-execute) — a standalone, self-obeying framework for WHAT the model is licensed to RELEASE into a code fence, and thus into user-owned systems. Models the experienced integration defect as (correct form available in-model) × (release layer that never checks the emission against it) — knowledge–emission divergence — and gates on what is about to be released, never on how casual the request was: seven defect classes by transmission vector, sixteen rules in four groups (mid-stream, turn-boundary, standing, mandate/license), a resident trigger table, a deployment residency map, and the live case study it was derived from. Consequential-side twin of verification-discipline: that framework gates what the model believes, this one gates what it releases. Ships the doctrine as a direct-invoke skill plus a resident-gate wrapper skill for user-level installs. Standalone; no external plugin dependencies.

plugins.name: envelope-discipline
plugins.description: Envelope Discipline (futures-land-as-fields) — a standalone, self-obeying framework for HOW a seam's configurables are shaped at the moment the seam is minted. Models interface calcification as (first-of-family mistaken for the whole story) × (no envelope reserved at the only cheap moment) and gates on what is about to be MINTED: the first option reveals the family and gets one named options envelope at birth; defaults are the null ask so no default carries doctrine; futures land as new named fields, never as signature breaks or per-knob rulings; the shape spans every layer of the seam, wire grammar included. Twelve rules in three groups, three mottos, and the live minting failure they were derived from. Shape-side sibling of verification-discipline (what may be believed) and emission-discipline (what may be released): this framework gates the contracts the other two operate across. Standalone; no external plugin dependencies.
